TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Klaus_Iohannis, title = Klaus_Iohannis, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Klaus_Iohannis} }

S.FORM: Klaus Werner Iohannis ryax sa tay 13 nqu tay 6, Klaus Iohannis, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1959) mrhuw Romania ta' misuw hya' ga Klaus Iohannis, aring ryax tay 21 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Klaus Werner Iohannis ryax sa tay 13 nqu tay 6, Klaus Iohannis, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1959) mrhuw Romania ta' misuw hya' ga Klaus Iohannis, aring ryax tay 21 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: klaus~ɕ werner ioħannis~ɕ rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, klaus~ɕ ioħannis~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw romania taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa klaus~ɕ ioħannis~ɕ, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
